_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for nv-generate-vae-finetune — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk declares.

vars.DATALIST: <path to MONAI-style datalist JSON with non-empty training[] and validation[]/testing[]>
vars.DATA_BASE_DIR: <dir used to resolve datalist relative image paths>
vars.MODALITY: <default modality for entries missing class: ct or mri (default mri)>
